message:
test(tui): add operator workflow benchmark validation (bd-xzt.3.10)

Validate that the new TUI cockpit achieves equal or improved operator
effectiveness vs the legacy single-screen dashboard. Defines 9 real-
incident benchmark scenarios (pressure triage, explainability query,
ballast diagnosis, candidate review, full incident response, degraded
mode, help discovery, timeline investigation, cross-screen correlation).

All 9 workflows show measurable improvement (≥ 1.5x aggregate ratio).
Additional validation: playbook severity adaptation, hint context-
awareness, navigation completeness, overlay isolation, error rate zero,
determinism, and keystroke efficiency (avg < 6 per workflow).

Also fixes test_unit_coverage unmapped key test (x → z) after bd-xzt.3.9
remapped x to IncidentQuickRelease.

19 new tests, all passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
